violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employees observed changing gloves without handwash in between.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -Wet wiping cloths sitting on prep cutting boards.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoop handle stored in ice bin.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Shelving in back prep area needs rust removed. -Shelving below griddle needs rust removed.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler. -Clean lower shelving in back prep area. -Clean shelf above prep table.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Single use straws stored under paper towel dispenser at front handwash.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Front handwash sink did not have hot water. Prep area handwash sink not working.
General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -Back entry door was propped open.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
